stemHtml: What does the OCA of a precision approach represent?

options.a: The lowest altitude at which a missed approach must be initiated to ensure compliance with obstacle clearance criteria.
options.b: The lowest altitude above aerodrome elevation below which descent is not permitted without meeting obstacle clearance criteria.
options.c: The lowest altitude or relevant threshold elevation below which descent is not permitted.
options.d: The lowest altitude below which a missed approach must be initiated if visual references are not established.
